# Extracao: Operation Quick-Start

- **Tipo:** TXT

﻿MINI-MODULE OPERATION QUICK-START

Welcome to Operation Quick Start. If you’re just starting out in your online business journey, or you’re about to launch a new business, this is how you get started fast so you can start making money quickly.


1 Introduction [14 minutes]
This lesson will introduce you to how to build a business where you see early progress that encourages you, and then you can build on that progress.

2 Mental Game, Part 1 [20 minutes]
If you work on your mental game first, there's no limit to what you can achieve in your business. In this lesson you'll learn how to work on your mental game.
	
3 First Steps [36 minutes]
In this lesson you'll learn about the very first, most important steps to take to get your business started.

4 Tools  [15 minutes]
This lesson is about the tools and technology you use to run your business and more importantly, how to pick the right tools for your situation.

5 Mental Game, Part 2 [13 minutes]
Working on your inner mental game takes practice and in this lesson you'll learn some ways you can create habits that keep you at the top of your mental game.

6 Conclusion [7 minutes]
This is a wrap-up of the lessons covered in Operation Quick Start.
